title: Flag Colours
editorialSummary: Flags grouped by design feature rather than country region; the false trail is that several Nordic countries share red-and-white colours but only some have the distinctive off-centre Nordic cross pattern.

meta.gptRationale: Flag-design grouping demands precise vexillology knowledge, and several countries could plausibly fit multiple visual themes to a casual player.

groups.label: Flags: Horizontal Red, White and Blue Tricolour
